channel.title: Jeff Helzner
channel.description: Essays on decision-making, uncertainty, and AI evaluation.

item.title: Evaluating AI Decisions Under Uncertainty: Why Outcomes Are Not Enough
item.description: Why accuracy against a labeled test set is not enough to evaluate AI decision quality under uncertainty.

item.title: Measuring AI Decision Quality: Beliefs, Preferences, and Standards of Choice
item.description: How beliefs, preferences, alternatives, and consequences define a procedural standard for measuring AI decision quality under uncertainty.

item.title: AI Decision Evaluation: Measuring Departures from a Decision Standard
item.description: Why sensitivity to departures from a stated decision standard matters when evaluating AI decision makers under uncertainty.
